feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Girls You Jerk To
entry.content: Girls You Jerk To

entry.content: towelielove

entry.title: /int/ International: Went to Las Vegas last month
entry.content: Holy shit that place is a shithole. You cannot get around anywhere without walking under that India tier dessert heat for hours, everything is expensive as shit, plus some parts of the streets smelled like marijuana and literal burning shit. How do people still go there? (met a tourist who was a bong). Millennials were lucky to visit it back then.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Q: You're a big admirer of Sonic Youth but you had a really bad relationship wit…
entry.content: Q: You're a big admirer of Sonic Youth but you had a really bad relationship with them at one time. Can you explain? A: On the Kill Yr Idols EP released on Zensor, the title track was a song calling for my death. Q: And you didn't find that funny? A: No, not at all. I hated it. Because the song was calling for my death. And, y'know, there's a lot of unhinged people out there. At Carola's urging, I put it on my top 30 singles of 1983 list, cleverly retitled "I Killed Christgau With My Big Fucking

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I have simp-fatigue
entry.content: When are we going to have a cool Spider-Man that does NOT simps for the first girl he sees, use guns, kill criminals and is famous and cool >"I am Peter Parker" >NYC: "we know, we love you!!" Every movie is him simping, in this new one (Spider-Man: Brand New Day) he's sad, depressed and stalks his ex Instagram. Wtf is this lame pathetic shit?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Linux enthusiasts cheer for Macbooks and Macminis marketshare trends just to du…
entry.content: >Linux enthusiasts cheer for Macbooks and Macminis marketshare trends just to dunk on Microsoft >"see chud your Windows desktop is losing" >they dont realize they support the replacement of x86 with ARM >aka replacement of Linux >aka the future is Apple silicon at 49.99% and Windows ARM at 49.99% while nobody will give a shit/support x86 at all >x86 becomes Itanium tier and dies That's pretty funny ngl seeing that community carefully and surgically dig their own grave because Microsoft bad or s

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >not opening the movie with real footage >not showing any UFOs at all besides TV…
entry.content: >not opening the movie with real footage >not showing any UFOs at all besides TV screen slop >starts with a WWE match This movie made me realize Spielberg is now a boomer. The story was fine but he should have given this movie to someone who would actually show things like Spielberg used to. How does he go from War of the Worlds to this?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: This is a public service announcement
entry.content: There is a lot of negativity right now in here when it comes to steam coming from all the usual suspects but i want to remind you all that all these years he never faltered when it mattered most to us.So if we fail him now what does this say about us? I want you to show right now how much you love Gabe! I want you to show as your tithe! I want you to open up your hearts! And open up your steam accounts! And open up your steam wallets! And buy buy buy in this most glorious sale! Buy at -50%. And

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What does /g/ think of the new CVVDP quality metric? It's a very advanced percep…
entry.content: What does /g/ think of the new CVVDP quality metric? It's a very advanced perceptual metric (ie correlates better with human opinion) that replaces the entire SSIM family (ie SSIMULACRA2, FSIM, MS-SSIM,), VMAF, PSNR, et cetera. >be codec engineer >compare two images >SSIM checks whether local image structures match >catches a lot of obvious mistakes >then visual artifact appears in a place humans barely notice >SSIM score tanks >ask CVVDP instead >it takes into account: >contrast sensitivity, ma

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The industry is OBLIGATED to support my x86 software if they want personal compu…
entry.content: The industry is OBLIGATED to support my x86 software if they want personal computing to move to strictly ARM-based platforms. I demand elegant and seamless translation layers for all the shit that was written for the "outgoing" processor architecture.

entry.content: >I’m pleased to announce the first preview release of xfwl4, Xfce’s Wayland compositor. >After close to six months of work, I feel like it’s ready to get some wider use, even though of course there will be bugs and missing features. Think of this as an alpha release. >https://www.spurint.org/journal/20 26/06/xfwl4s-first-preview-release >https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/xfwl4 Xuds BTFO

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /trash/ General Drawthread
entry.content: Pop Up Pussy Edition General rules: • No one reads or cares about this shit anyway. • Don't be a dick to others; mind your own business, and don't cause tension over requests/art you don't like. • Provide descriptions, links, and image references in a single post as much as possible. • Don't spam or bump your requests. • Check the dropbox or booru to see if your request was done. • AI deliveries are NOT allowed • Ignore shitposters and attention whores at all times. Just report and move on. • Wh

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Toyota Corolla GR
entry.content: >button marked track >take car to track >engine explodes due to inadequate cooling >sorry gaijin, pay for it yourself, racing is not allowed! What's wrong with it? Boost pressure too high? Intercooler inadequately designed? Car and Driver said they ditched the fog lights for additional air intakes but it still overheated after 6 laps at the track. Also, the interior is horrendous and they do nothing to improve it. I know a new generation is coming, but it won't be much better, just a bigger scre

entry.title: /o/ Auto: You may not like it, but this is what automotive perfection looks like. It's a b…
entry.content: You may not like it, but this is what automotive perfection looks like. It's a blank canvas for the artist. A love letter to the driving enthusiast. A machine built not to impress shareholders, but to reward the true gearheads. It's the empty front row at a concert, reserved for those who have been a fan since day 1. Its a drift car, a drag car, a time attack car, a daily commuter, a touge beast, a winter beater. It can be anything. Is it the best at any one thing? No. But that's the beauty of i

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: DC Universe is safe
entry.content: James Gunn has the trust and approval of David Ellison. Gunn's DC Universe will keep going according to plans post-merger. >“He’s pretty open to what we’re doing. We do have a slate and a lot of it — obviously, Clayface is already coming out. We already have the Lanterns TV show. On those things, the train’s left the station. So we’re good. But he’s a big fan, he’s been great with us. He’s giving us kind of what we want. So far, everything’s good.” https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/m ovies/movie

entry.title: /b/ Random: i don't understand why life keeps sending me these messages if i can't do anythi…
entry.content: i don't understand why life keeps sending me these messages if i can't do anything with the 'information' (not strictly information), it's like i'm being informed of something, but with no particular purpose for the message...what is this? it has happened so many times, and i have never felt like i was any closer to figuring this shit out.

entry.title: /int/ International: >In this country, kids can’t play in parks unless the apartment they live in is …
entry.content: >In this country, kids can’t play in parks unless the apartment they live in is included in the ownership agreement or they have permission. This is the kind of shit you hear from African countries led by schizo dictators who think that non-elite blacks are slaves. What the actual fuck? This is a pure thirdie behavior. Didn't expect that.

Woke up to my bros mom sucking my dick once (half brother) was 19 had passed out at their place hafter a party she got me hard then rode me, we never spoke about it. I was so fucked up I could barely walk to the bathroom. Didn't move hardly the whole time she fucked me. #2 blonde cheerleader type passed out drunk carried her home before fucking her repeatedly, she woke for like ten seconds to say "yes, yesss" and blacked out. entry.title: /mu/ Music: That DAW sound...
entry.content: Something hollow, fake, lame about the DAW sound. Not enough of a human feel, and the 'humanize' functions don't seem to do the trick. Womenpop and Gpop are especially vulnerable to being produced with that soulless DAW sound. Tweens seem to like it, but they can be trained to like any drivel. How do you avoid that soulless DAW sound? Keep the sidechaining to a minimum, keep compression turned off except on lead vocals (if you're a vocal music cuckold), stop quantizing, better DACs and ADCs help

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I know it's hard to get a grip on, kids, but people keep getting older. They don…
entry.content: I know it's hard to get a grip on, kids, but people keep getting older. They don't just reach some inconceivable benchmark--50 or, God, 60--and stop, Old in some absolute sense. The bones, the joints, the genitals, the juices, the delivery systems, and eventually the mind continue to break down, at an unpredictable pace in unpredictable ways. Leonard Cohen has had No Voice since he began recording at 33. But he has more No Voice today, at 70, than he did on Ten New Songs, at 67--the tenderness i

It's Yourz >9. Triumph >10. Impossible >11. Little Ghetto Boys >12. Bells of War >13. The MGM >14. Dogshit >15. Duck Seazon >16. Hellz Wind Staff >17. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is it worth learning any programming language when you can just vibecode? I don'…
entry.content: Is it worth learning any programming language when you can just vibecode? I don't know shit about programming but I'd like to start but it gets me wonder if I should when there's an ai to do all the job for me. Personally, the whole vibecoding thing feels like a giant bubble where people throw away their knowledge and hope the ai will fix everything. Should I bother or if all what I've just said is total bullshit and I should go full ai?

entry.content: I think, as an above 16 year old user, that the social media banning and internet censorship that has been happening since I believe 2023 is DISGUSTING. All of this censorship in multiple countries for the internet, which was originally made for free communication, is an ever-expanding thing that's slowly step-by-step taking away some or even most freedoms. Especially in the UK where by the year 2027, users under 16 wont be allowed on big social media platforms, but YouTube kids will be an excep
